title: Giant Lily Pads
description: This mod adds giant lily pads that naturally generate on water
body:
This mod adds giant lily pads that naturally generate on water in Warm and Lukewarm Ocean biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f13c9fc83b03f1e64ffe91ae2802d5685e85a3f.jpeg)

- You can walk or build on them, making them perfect natural platforms in the water.
- They come in a variety of different sizes and textures.

 

**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
